message:
🌱 Add atlantis: Add support for bitbucket cloud webhook secrets mission (#1063)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-3909-add-support-for-bitbucket-cloud-webhook-secrets",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: Add support for bitbucket cloud webhook secrets",
+    "description": "Add support for bitbucket cloud webhook secrets. Requested by 26+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current atlantis deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your atlantis version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nhelm list -n atlantis 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working atlantis installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\n### Community Note\n\n- Please vote on this issue by adding a 👍 [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add support for bitbucket cloud webhook secrets",
+        "description": "## what\n\nAdded support for Bitbucket Cloud Webhook secrets. Bitbucket added support in the cloud offering in October of 2023 [Announcement](https://bitbucket.org/blog/enhanced-webhook-security)\n\n* Ported the request validation libraries from bitbucket server to bitbucket cloud client.\n* Removed error check and associated test to ensure they aren't being used because they weren't supported\n\n## why\n\nThere is an open request for this #3909 and I'm also in need of this feature.\n\n## tests\n\nI ran\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add support for bitbucket cloud webhook secrets\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## what\n\nAdded support for Bitbucket Cloud Webhook secrets. Bitbucket added support in the cloud offering in October of 2023 [Announcement](https://bitbucket.org/blog/enhanced-webhook-security)\n\n* Ported the request validation libraries from bitbucket server to bitbucket cloud client.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
